title: voice-intake finishing touches (BACKLOG #27 a+b)
description: Two small carried-forward polish tasks from the archived voice-intake change: (a) setup.mjs should optionally scaffold agents/voice-config.json during project setup — add it as an optional prompt/section following setup.mjs's existing patterns (respect --yes non-interactive mode: skip by default), copying from a template or the reference agents/voice-config.json shape; (b) add voice input to framework/maturity-model.md as an OPTIONAL Level 6 capability checklist line (one line, marked optional). Do NOT attempt item (d) manual end-to-end audio test — that requires a human with a microphone. Add/extend a unit test covering the setup.mjs scaffolding path (non-interactive) in the existing test files' style.
